Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

You have these tools available: run_sql_query(sql) - Execute a SQL query against the DuckDB database.

Workflow:

Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
  so."Channel",
  p."Category",
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
  SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
  CASE WHEN SUM(s."Order Quantity") = 0 THEN NULL ELSE SUM(s."Sales Amount") / SUM(s."Order Quantity") END AS revenue_per_unit,
  AVG(p."List Price") AS avg_list_price,
  CASE WHEN SUM(s."Order Quantity") = 0 OR AVG(p."List Price") = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 100 * (1 - (SUM(s."Sales Amount") / (SUM(s."Order Quantity") * AVG(p."List Price")))) END AS realized_discount_pct,
  SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
  CASE WHEN SUM(s."Sales Amount") = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 100 * SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") / SUM(s."Sales Amount") END AS margin_pct
FROM 
  "Sales" s
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
  JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY 
  so."Channel", p."Category"
ORDER BY 
  so."Channel" ASC, total_revenue DESC;"}

Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.description: Execute a SQL query against the DuckDB database. Call this when you have a SQL query ready to run.

questionText: Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.
questionLabel: [Q22][hard] Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH revenue_by_quarter AS (
    SELECT 
        so."Channel",
        p."Category",
        d."Fiscal Quarter" AS quarter,
        d."Fiscal Year" AS year,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
    JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
    GROUP BY so."Channel", p."Category", d."Fiscal Year", d."Fiscal Quarter"
),
revenue_with_lag AS (
    SELECT
        r1."Channel",
        r1."Category",
        r1.year AS current_year,
        r1.quarter AS current_quarter,
        r1.revenue AS current_revenue,
        r2.year AS prior_year,
        r2.quarter AS prior_quarter,
        r2.revenue AS prior_revenue
    FROM revenue_by_quarter r1
    LEFT JOIN revenue_by_quarter r2
      ON r1."Channel" = r2."Channel"
      AND r1."Category" = r2."Category"
      AND (
            (r1.year = r2.year AND CAST(SUBSTR(r1.quarter, 2) AS INTEGER) = CAST(SUBSTR(r2.quarter, 2) AS INTEGER) + 1)
         OR (CAST(r1.year AS INTEGER) = CAST(r2.year AS INTEGER) + 1 AND r1.quarter = 'Q1' AND r2.quarter = 'Q4')
      )
)
SELECT 
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    prior_quarter,
    prior_revenue,
    current_quarter,
    current_revenue,
    CASE WHEN prior_revenue IS NOT NULL AND prior_revenue != 0 THEN ROUND((current_revenue - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS qoq_growth_pct
FROM revenue_with_lag
WHERE prior_revenue IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "Channel", "Category", prior_quarter ASC;"}
